trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text: 'Our formation was scattered after Sea Gate fell. If you're fighting the Eldrazi, consider us your newest recruits.' [Scryfall] — Sea Gate was the largest city on Zendikar's continent of Tazeem, described as the center of commerce and learning before its fall during the Eldrazi assault. [WebSearch: Sea Gate MTG Wiki] The speaker is an unnamed Knight Ally joining forces against the Eldrazi — exactly the two Knight Ally tokens this card creates.

Allied Reinforcements creates two 2/2 white Knight Ally tokens for 3W. As a token doubler for Ally-tribal strategies, it synergizes with Ally enter-the-battlefield triggers. EDHREC rank 18970 and penny-dreadful legal. [Scryfall] The related token card is officially part of the same Scryfall record.

Art by Matt Stewart, a prolific MTG illustrator with credits across dozens of sets. The mounted charge composition depicts two distinct mount types — a boar and a horse — suggesting the Ally coalition draws fighters from multiple peoples of Zendikar. [Scryfall]

related_cards.name: Ally Encampment
related_cards.note: Core Ally-tribal support land from the same block

related_cards.name: Sea Gate Wreckage
related_cards.note: Same set, references Sea Gate's destruction directly

related_cards.name: Captain's Claws
related_cards.note: Same set, also creates Kor Ally tokens for tribal synergy
